# Al Esmail

> Commercial founder turned Venture Scientist. 15+ years building deep tech startups from first principles. Currently pursuing a Venture Science Doctorate at Deep Science Ventures, focused on climate: energy, water, food, and materials.

Al Esmail is a Venture Scientist at Deep Science Ventures (London/Prague). He holds a B.Eng in Chemical Engineering from McGill University (2009) and an MBA from INSEAD (2016), and is currently completing a Venture Science Doctorate (PhD) at Deep Science Ventures / Woolf.

## Thesis

The material world — energy, water, food, and materials — is the next great frontier for deep tech entrepreneurship. Al brings a rare combination of chemical engineering and commercial operator experience to venture formation in these sectors.

## Current Work

- **Venture Scientist, Deep Science Ventures** (2026–present): Systematically designing and validating deep tech ventures in the climate space using a scientific approach to company formation.

## Professional Background

- **Fractional COO, Kairos AI** (2023–2025): AI/GTM strategy for enterprise clients
- **Commercial Founder & CEO, Telesqope** (2022–2023): AI SaaS for video editing. VC-backed by Notion Capital and Credo Ventures. Raised $150k. Backed by Tom Blomfield (YC/Monzo) and Lawrence Lundy (Lunar Ventures).
- **Venture Partner, Lunar Ventures** (2020–2021): Early-stage VC, London
- **Commercial Founder & CEO, WoTT Security** (2018–2020): Cybersecurity for edge devices using mTLS. Backed by Obor Capital.
- **Category Manager, GetYourGuide** (2017): Berlin
- **Founder & CEO, RuffhausCrew** (2013–2015): Consumer chemistry
- **Senior Analyst, Canadian National Railway** (2011–2015): Data and operations
- **Chemical Engineer, AtkinsRéalis** (2010–2011): Engineering design

## Education

- **Venture Science Doctorate (PhD)**, Deep Science Ventures / Woolf — 2026–present (Climate focus)
- **MBA**, INSEAD — 2016 (Fontainebleau, France)
- **B.Eng Chemical Engineering**, McGill University — 2009 (Montreal, Canada)

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Two companies founded, two funding rounds raised
- Backed by: Notion Capital, Credo Ventures, Obor Capital, Tom Blomfield (YC/Monzo), Lawrence Lundy (Lunar Ventures)
- R&D Tax Relief awarded by HMRC for both Telesqope (Computer Vision AI) and WoTT Security (mTLS / vulnerability clustering)
- 15+ years experience across UK, EU (Czech Republic, France, Germany), and North America
- Available for: investor conversations, fractional COO / advisory roles in early-stage deep tech

## Short Bio — MDC Berlin

I'm a chemical engineer by training who spent the last 15 years founding and operating startups — including a VC-backed AI company with Notion Capital and Credo Ventures — before making the deliberate move into deep tech venture science focused on climate materials.

Along the way I also spent time as a venture partner at Lunar Ventures and as a fractional COO, so I have an unusual mix of technical, commercial, and investment experience that I'm now channelling into figuring out where the real scientific breakthroughs in energy, water, food, and materials can become large companies.

I grew up in Montreal, studied at McGill and INSEAD, and have been living and working across Europe for the last decade — most recently Prague, with a stint in Berlin at GetYourGuide.
